common.noPermission: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command!
common.ownerOnly: ❌ This command is only for the bot owner!
common.tryAgain: Please check the command usage and try again.

prefix.title: ⚙️ Bot Prefix
prefix.tooLong: ❌ Prefix cannot be more than 5 characters!

userinfo.title: 📋 {tag}
userinfo.noMention: ❌ Mention the user you want to check!
userinfo.notInServer: ❌ That user is not a member of this server!

kick.noMention: ❌ Mention the user you want to kick!

ban.noMention: ❌ Mention the user you want to ban!
ban.notBannable: ❌ I cannot ban this user! (Role too high or server owner)
ban.title: 🔨 Member Banned!
ban.failed: ❌ Failed to ban user! Check bot permissions.

unban.noId:
❌ Enter the ID of the user to unban!
Example: `!unban 123456789012345678`
unban.invalidId: ❌ Invalid user ID! Discord IDs consist of 17-19 digits.
unban.notBanned: ❌ This user is not in the ban list!
unban.title: ✅ User Unbanned!
unban.failed: ❌ Failed to unban user! Check bot permissions.

mute.noMention:
❌ Mention the user you want to mute!
Example: `!mute @user 10m spam`
mute.notModeratable: ❌ I cannot mute this user! (Role too high)
mute.title: 🔇 Member Muted!
mute.failed: ❌ Failed to mute user! Check bot permissions.

unmute.noMention: ❌ Mention the user you want to unmute!
unmute.title: 🔊 Member Unmuted!
unmute.failed: ❌ Failed to unmute user! Check bot permissions.

warn.noMention:
❌ Mention the user you want to warn!
Example: `!warn @user spam`
warn.title: ⚠️ Member Warned!

warnings.noWarns: ✅ **{tag}** has no warnings in this server!
warnings.title: ⚠️ Warning List: {tag}

language.noPermission: ❌ You don't have permission to change the bot language!
language.title: 🌐 Bot Language

player.noVoiceChannel: ❌ You need to be in a voice channel to use music commands!
player.playError: ❌ Failed to play the track! Check if the URL is valid and try again.
player.noQueue: ❌ There is no music queue to show!
player.emptyQueue: ✅ The music queue is currently empty!
